# AGENTS.md — Search by Surname

## Project Overview

R-based batch search tool for Spanish telephone directories by surname.

- **Repo:** [GeiserX/search-by-surname](https://github.com/GeiserX/search-by-surname)
- **Language:** R
- **License:** GPL-3.0

## Security

> **Do not commit secrets to the repository.**
> Use environment variables or secure vaults for credentials.
